name: AnalysisPartAreaAttributes
summary: The AnalysisPartAreaAttributes class contains information related to analysis part area attributes.

constructors.name: AnalysisPartAreaAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisPartAreaAttributes class

properties.name: AreaElementSizeHoles
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area element size holes.

properties.name: AreaElementSizeX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area element size X.

properties.name: AreaElementSizeY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area element size Y.

properties.name: AreaElementType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area element type.

properties.name: AreaRotationXY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area rotation XY.

properties.name: AreaStartNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start number of the area.

properties.name: AreaSupport
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area support.

properties.name: AreaSupportType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area support type.

properties.name: MinimumAreaHoleSize
properties.summary: Gets or sets the minimum area hole size.

properties.name: RigidDiaphragmFilterName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the filter name of the rigid diaphragm.

properties.name: UseSimpleArea
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether simple areas are used.
